name: a5_input_validation_cli_retry_20260421
outcome_goal: An endpoint x input type x validator matrix is stored as decision.2026-04-20.input-validation-matrix; every unvalidated endpoint is filed as a bug with signature input-validation::<endpoint>.

jobs.label: a5_input_validation
jobs.prompt: Build the trust-boundary validation matrix. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/rest.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/agent_sessions.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/handlers/_dispatch.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/mcp/tools/workflow.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/contracts/domain.py. For each endpoint record endpoint, input_type, validator, failure behavior, gap. Persist operator_decisions key decision.2026-04-20.input-validation-matrix with rationale containing endpoint_validation_matrix and endpoint_count=<N>. File bugs input-validation::<endpoint> for gaps. Transport constraint: use CLI only; do not use Anthropic API or any llm_task route.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc ". ./scripts/_workflow_env.sh && workflow_load_repo_env && psql "$WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL" -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM operator_decisions WHERE decision_key='decision.2026-04-20.input-validation-matrix' AND rationale LIKE '%endpoint_validation_matrix%'\" | rg '^1$'"
